summary: Mission v11.7 - Multi-partenaires & Flux Intelligent VALIDATED. All features verified: 1) Scroll disabled (overflow-hidden) when only 1 partner, 2) Double-click on Super Admin video does NOT redirect (just play/pause), 3) Réserver button scrolls to offers section, 4) Data integrity verified (21 reservations, 14 contacts, credits BOSS working).

issues: YouTube video 'Video unavailable' - external URL issue, not app issue

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PartnersCarousel.js L856-857: Conditional overflow class works (overflow-hidden for 1 partner, overflow-y-auto for multiple)
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L141-143: SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS array correctly defines SA emails
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L177-183: Double-click on SA video triggers play/pause only, not navigation
✅ CoachVitrine.js L771-773: Réserver button uses scrollIntoView to vitrine-courses-section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v11.7 fully validated. Key features: scroll disabled when 1 partner (line 856 PartnersCarousel.js), Super Admin double-click blocked (lines 177-183), Réserver scroll works (line 771-773 CoachVitrine.js). Data: 21 reservations, 14 contacts, 100 BOSS credits.

2_super_admin_double_click.behavior: isSuperAdminVideo check prevents navigation, only play/pause
2_super_admin_double_click.verified_via: Console log: '[SUPER-ADMIN] Navigation vers vitrine Super Admin désactivée'

3_reserver_scroll.verified_via: Playwright shows offers section visible after click
